title: Virtualization Storage Create Help
stdout:
Usage: python -m proxbox_cli virtualization storage-create                     
            [OPTIONS]                                                           
                                                                                
 Sync Proxmox storage definitions into NetBox. [NOTE: triggers sync]            
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --json          Output raw JSON.                                             │
│ --yaml          Output YAML.                                                 │
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
notes: Sync Proxmox storage definitions into NetBox.
